basics.name: Your Name
basics.summary: I build reliable web experiences with a focus on performance, accessibility, and clean architecture.

hero.headline: Evolución técnica de producto web en producción
hero.subheadline: Microfrontends, design systems y delivery sin perder velocidad.
proofs: Design system + librería consumida por microfronts
Arquitectura técnica y evolución incremental sobre web existente
Visión end-to-end: entornos, pipelines, prácticas de entrega

platform.title: Platform & Architecture
bullets: Definí patrones de integración y contratos para microfrontends.
Construí/extendí librería de estilos + componentes reutilizables.
Evolucioné aplicaciones existentes con foco en estabilidad y DX.
Contribuí a pipelines/entornos para mejorar delivery y confiabilidad.

about.title: About
paragraphs: I build user-facing products with a strong focus on performance, accessibility, and maintainable systems.
I like pragmatic engineering: clear specs, measurable outcomes, and clean delivery.

achievements: Improved core flows UX and reduced UI regressions with stronger component boundaries.
Optimized critical screens, reducing perceived latency and improving responsiveness.
Partnered with design/product to ship features with a11y and performance baked in.

projects.name: CV Website (Vanilla)
projects.description: Neo-brutalist CV built with Web Components, JSON-driven content, and a canvas particle graph.

projects.name: Mana Forge (Full Stack Monorepo)
projects.description: MTG deck analysis platform with a React UI, a Spring Boot REST API, and a stateless FastAPI AI engine (Groq Llama 3.3) delivering structured JSON insights.
highlights: Monorepo full-stack dev via Docker Compose
AI service is JSON-only + stateless (structured insights)
